hooks.command: HOOK_INPUT=$(cat); cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && if [ -f .claude/.push_failed ]; then echo '⚠️ 前回のpushが失敗しています：' && cat .claude/.push_failed && echo '---' && echo '対処法: git pull origin main してから git push origin main'; fi && git pull origin main 2>/dev/null || true && if [ -f tools/session_health.py ]; then echo '--- セッション健康診断 ---' && printf '%s' "$HOOK_INPUT" | python3 tools/session_health.py --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi

HOOK_INPUT=$(cat); cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)" && git add -A && if ! git diff --cached --quiet; then git commit -m "auto-sync: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')"; fi && if ! git push origin main 2>.claude/.push_error; then cp .claude/.push_error .claude/.push_failed && echo 'PUSH失敗: 次回起動時に通知します'; else rm -f .claude/.push_failed .claude/.push_error; fi && if [ -f tools/session_health.py ]; then printf '%s' "$HOOK_INPUT" | python3 tools/session_health.py --quiet 2>/dev/null || true; fi
